docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR TO PLACE SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-26-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 303

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-26-2002 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON SEP-03-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN 206 FOR POSSIBLE SETTLED PROTECTIVE DATE.
MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2002 11:00 AM FOR DEPT 303

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-26-2002 IN DEPT. 303 ALL PARTIES PRESENT. SETTLEMENT REACHED AS MORE FULLY SET FORTH ON THE RECORD. SEPTEMBER 3, 2002 TRIAL DATE NOT TO BE VACATED PENDING SIGNATURE OF YESA VOLUNTAD ON THE STIPULATION. JUDGE PERKER MEEKS; CLERK J. BAUBEL; REPORTER M. BALDOCCHI (303)
MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-03-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, CARLOS BEA. NO APPEARANCE BY REMAINING DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

COURT TRIAL ON SEP-03-2002 IN DEPT. 514 - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; CRT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF AGAINST DEFT.FOR $1,863.42 ( BACK RENT $ 1,300 PLUS DAMAGE $563.42); COUNSEL SACRAMENTO TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AND SUBMIT TO D514/JUDGE BEA
